case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. DAVID BARNES et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES, DAVID DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-18-2012
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES, DAVID
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT BARNES, DAVID

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARNES, DAVID $11,585.95 PRINCIPAL, $618.15 INTEREST, $438.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,642.10, DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $702.33 DUE ON THE 11TH DAY OF EACH MONTH.......SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH... NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED DEC-26-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARNES, DAVID
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
